title: Spotlight | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Spotlight
On the Road Again: Traveling China with Charlie Howes '25With an itch to see more of China's lesser-visited regions, I began planning a trip to the northwest with seven friends — five Americans, one Pakistani, one Zimbabwean, and one Colombian.
Spring into Action: Student-Led Fitness on CampusIntramural sports and recreational activities are more than just about getting into shape—they’re a great way to meet new people, make memories, and find your crew.
An Eye For Shanghai: Study Away Students Look BackStudy Away at NYU Shanghai offers students an amazing opportunity to travel, make new friends, explore academic interests, and expand language skills.
Zhao Chen: Computer Science and Competitive BridgeAssistant Professor of Computer Science Zhao Chen arrived at NYU Shanghai in the fall of 2023.
What I’m Working On: Marcela Godoy Cultivates Community Through SustainabilityMarcela inspires students to approach sustainability critically and creatively while cultivating a community of knowledge sharers and accessible resources.
Finding their Voice: Chinese Heritage Language Learners at NYU Shanghai At NYU Shanghai, heritage language learners are getting a chance to improve their Mandarin skills while being exposed to the language outside of class and immersed in Chinese culture and society.
What I’m Working On: Wang Mingyuan on Cryptography Coached by some of the world’s top minds in the field, the Assistant Professor of Computer Science made cryptography a lifetime academic pursuit.
No Translation Needed—Dessert is Delicious in Every LanguageInternational Dessert Festival--the sweetest way to celebrate learning languages
Summer Adventures for Migrant Youth at NYU ShanghaiThe camp was founded to support the children of migrant workers who grew up in Shanghai but face an imminent life transition as they must leave the city to continue their education in the places where their parents came from.
Leveling Up: Chinese Immersion Program Students Accept the Challenge Learn how studying Mandarin in an intensive immersion program equips students with the cultural and linguistic competence to take on the world!
What I’m Working On: Visiting Professor of Mathematics Wei-Min Wang Visiting Professor of Mathematics Wei-Min Wang says joining NYU Shanghai as a visiting professor has helped her find a way to come back home.
A Week of Hoops and Cultural Exchange – NYU Basketball Teams’ Trip to ShanghaiNYU’s men's and women's basketball teams recently wrapped up a memorable one-week visit to Shanghai, to participate in the 2024 Buick Campus Invitational, a doubleheader against Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU).
Balancing the Present with the Future: How We Decide on Majors at NYU ShanghaiEvery undergraduate student at NYUSH is paired with an academic advisor based on their academic interests.
All Eyes on Lanternflies: Student's Research Bridges Shanghai and New YorkLearn how one NYU Shanghai graduate bridged her research connecting two continents.
NYU Shanghai’s Class of 2024 Looks Back on Their Four Years Graduating seniors reflect on what they thought their NYU Shanghai experience would be four years ago.
